title: Tallon Christmas Label Gift Stickers – Pack of 100 Self-Adhesive Tags in 8 Traditional Designs – Seasonal Stickers for Wrapping & Packaging
features: PACK OF 100 LABELS – Includes 100 self-adhesive labels for seasonal use
8 TRADITIONAL DESIGNS – Features Santa with sleigh, robins, reindeer and festive trees
EASY TO APPLY – Peel-and-stick backing for quick and tidy use
VERSATILE APPLICATION – Ideal for paper, bags, boxes and envelopes
CLASSIC FESTIVE LOOK – Adds a timeless seasonal touch to all your parcels
description: Bring a classic festive touch to your wrapping with these Tallon Christmas label stickers. Each pack contains 100 self-adhesive tags across 8 traditional designs, including robins, reindeer, trees and Santa with sleigh. With their timeless artwork and warm seasonal colours, these labels make every parcel feel extra special. Each tag includes a clear “To” and “From” section, making them simple to personalise for friends, family and colleagues. Designed with peel-and-stick backing, they can be quickly applied to wrapping paper, festive bags, boxes or envelopes, keeping your packaging neat and organised. Perfect for adding a traditional finish to family presents, workplace exchanges or children’s surprises, these label stickers are an essential addition to your seasonal wrapping supplies.
